FR-01.title: Employee Onboarding
requirements: Online onboarding form with personal and employment details
Document upload for ID, tax forms, and contracts
Welcome kit and IT setup requests

FR-03.title: Attendance and Time Tracking
requirements: Clock in/out via web or mobile

FR-04.title: Leave Management
requirements: Apply for leave with type and dates

FR-05.title: Payroll Processing
requirements: Calculate salary with deductions and allowances
Direct deposit to employee bank account

FR-07.title: Recruitment and Job Postings
requirements: Post job openings internally and externally

FR-08.title: Training and Development
requirements: Assign training to employees or departments

FR-09.title: Organization Chart
requirements: Visual org chart with reporting structure

FR-13.title: Benefits Administration
acceptance_criteria: Enrollment opens and closes on schedule

FR-16.title: Employee Directory
requirements: Filter by department, location, and role

FR-18.title: Compliance and Audit
acceptance_criteria: Expiry alerts sent before due date

FR-23.title: Asset Management
requirements: Track company assets assigned to employees

FR-26.title: Mobile App Access
requirements: Mobile app for attendance and leave

FR-29.title: Probation Management
requirements: Track probation periods with end dates

FR-30.title: Letter Generation
requirements: Offer letters, experience letters, salary certificates

FR-01.title: Build Onboarding API
FR-01.description: Create POST /api/employees/onboard (personal, employment details). Document upload. Checklist CRUD with task assignments. Trigger IT and facilities requests.

FR-01.title: Build Onboarding Flow
FR-01.description: Create multi-step onboarding wizard: personal info, document uploads, checklist with progress, and welcome screen. New hire dashboard.

FR-02.title: Build Profile API
FR-02.description: Create GET/PATCH /api/employees/:id/profile. Emergency contacts CRUD. Photo upload. GET /api/employees/:id/history (role changes, promotions).

FR-02.title: Build Profile Page
FR-02.description: Create employee profile with editable personal info, emergency contacts section, photo uploader, and employment history timeline.

FR-03.title: Build Attendance API
FR-03.description: Create POST /api/attendance/clock-in, /clock-out with timestamp and optional GPS. Overtime calculation service. GET /api/attendance/report (filters: employee, date range).

FR-03.title: Build Attendance UI
FR-03.description: Create clock in/out button with timer display, GPS map for remote check-in, attendance calendar view with color-coded days, and summary reports.

FR-04.title: Build Leave API
FR-04.description: Create POST /api/leaves (type, from, to, reason). Manager approval endpoint. Balance tracking per leave type per year. Holiday calendar CRUD.

FR-04.title: Build Leave UI
FR-04.description: Create leave application form with type selector, date range picker, balance display. Manager approval queue. Leave calendar showing team availability.

FR-05.title: Build Payroll Engine
FR-05.description: Create payroll service: base salary + allowances - deductions - taxes. Tax computation with jurisdiction rules. Payslip PDF generation. Bank file for direct deposit.

FR-05.title: Build Payroll UI
FR-05.description: Create payroll run interface for HR: review calculations, adjust if needed, approve, and process. Employee payslip viewer with download.

FR-06.title: Build Performance API
FR-06.description: Create review cycle CRUD. Self and manager assessment endpoints. 360 feedback collection. Goal CRUD with progress tracking. Rating calculations.

FR-06.title: Build Performance UI
FR-06.description: Create review cycle setup, assessment forms with rating scales, peer feedback request, goal setting with milestones, and performance summary dashboard.

FR-07.title: Build Recruitment API
FR-07.description: Create job posting CRUD with channel publishing. ATS pipeline stages. Interview scheduling with calendar integration. Offer letter template engine.

FR-07.title: Build Recruitment UI
FR-07.description: Create job posting form, applicant pipeline board, interview scheduler with calendar view, and offer letter preview/send.

FR-08.title: Build Training API
FR-08.description: Create CRUD for programs and courses. Assignment endpoints (individual/department). Completion tracking. Certification generation. Training calendar.

FR-08.title: Build Training UI
FR-08.description: Create training catalog, enrollment page, progress tracker per employee, certificate download, and training calendar with upcoming sessions.

FR-09.title: Build Org Chart API
FR-09.description: Create GET /api/organization/chart (hierarchical data). PATCH /api/employees/:id/reporting-to (reassign). Department tree structure.

FR-09.title: Build Org Chart UI
FR-09.description: Create interactive org chart with expandable nodes, employee cards (photo, name, title), click-to-profile, and drag-to-reassign with confirmation.

FR-10.title: Build Expense API
FR-10.description: Create POST /api/expenses (amount, category, receipt_image, description). Category limits. Manager approval. Reimbursement tracking and batch processing.

FR-10.title: Build Expense UI
FR-10.description: Create expense submission form with receipt photo/scan, claim history list, manager approval queue, and reimbursement status tracker.

FR-11.title: Build Self-Service API
FR-11.description: Create GET /api/employees/me/payslips, /tax-documents. Personal info update. POST /api/document-requests (type: employment_letter, etc.). Policy document search.

FR-11.title: Build Employee Portal
FR-11.description: Create self-service dashboard with payslip archive, tax document downloads, personal info editor, document request form, and policy library.

FR-12.title: Build Shift API
FR-12.description: Create CRUD for shifts and patterns. Employee assignment. POST /api/shifts/swap (request between employees). Coverage gap detection algorithm.

FR-12.title: Build Shift UI
FR-12.description: Create shift calendar with drag-assign, employee availability view, swap request dialog, and gap alerts highlighted in red.

FR-13.title: Build Benefits API
FR-13.description: Create benefit plans CRUD. Enrollment period management. Cost calculation engine per employee selections. Dependent management.

FR-13.title: Build Benefits UI
FR-13.description: Create benefits enrollment page with plan comparison, selection wizard, cost preview, dependent add form, and enrollment status.

FR-14.title: Build Disciplinary API
FR-14.description: Create POST /api/employees/:id/disciplinary (type, description, evidence). Progressive discipline workflow. Employee acknowledgment endpoint.

FR-14.title: Build Disciplinary UI
FR-14.description: Create disciplinary record form with evidence upload, history timeline per employee, acknowledgment prompt, and escalation indicators.

FR-15.title: Build Offboarding API
FR-15.description: Create POST /api/employees/:id/exit (type: resignation/termination). Exit interview form. Asset return checklist. Final settlement calculation with all components.

FR-15.title: Build Offboarding UI
FR-15.description: Create exit process wizard: initiation, exit interview form, asset return checklist, final settlement preview, and clearance status tracker.

FR-16.title: Build Directory API
FR-16.description: Create GET /api/employees/directory (searchable, filterable by department, location, role). Contact info. Team listing per department.

FR-16.title: Build Directory UI
FR-16.description: Create searchable employee directory with cards (photo, name, department, contact), filters, and department team listing view.

FR-17.title: Build Document Storage API
FR-17.description: Create CRUD for employee documents with categories and tags. Version control. Access control per document type and role.

FR-17.title: Build Document Manager UI
FR-17.description: Create document repository with category tree, upload with tagging, version history, and permission settings dialog.

FR-18.title: Build Compliance API
FR-18.description: Create compliance tracker: mandatory training status, license expiry alerts, audit log for all HR actions. Compliance dashboard endpoints.

FR-18.title: Build Compliance Dashboard
FR-18.description: Create compliance overview with training completion rates, expiring certifications list, audit log viewer, and compliance score per department.

FR-19.title: Build Survey API
FR-19.description: Create survey CRUD with question types. Anonymous response collection. Distribution to groups. Result aggregation and analytics.

FR-19.title: Build Survey UI
FR-19.description: Create survey builder with question types, preview, distribution settings. Survey-taking form. Results dashboard with charts.

FR-20.title: Build Announcements API
FR-20.description: Create CRUD for announcements. Target audience filtering. Pin/unpin. Acknowledgment tracking per employee.

FR-20.title: Build Announcements UI
FR-20.description: Create announcement feed with pinned items at top, department filter, and acknowledge button. Admin composer with targeting.

FR-21.title: Build Overtime API
FR-21.description: Create POST /api/overtime/request (date, hours, reason). Approval workflow. Hours accumulation tracking. Pay rate configuration per overtime type.

FR-21.title: Build Overtime UI
FR-21.description: Create OT request form, approval queue, hours summary per pay period, and department OT reports.

FR-22.title: Build Grievance API
FR-22.description: Create POST /api/grievances (description, confidential flag). HR assignment. Resolution steps tracking. SLA-based escalation.

FR-22.title: Build Grievance UI
FR-22.description: Create confidential grievance form, HR case management view, resolution timeline, and escalation alerts.

FR-23.title: Build Asset Tracking API
FR-23.description: Create CRUD for company assets. POST /api/assets/:id/assign (to employee). POST /api/assets/:id/return (with condition note). Category and location tracking.

FR-23.title: Build Asset Management UI
FR-23.description: Create asset inventory list, assignment dialog, return form with condition selector, and employee asset summary.

FR-24.title: Build HR Analytics API
FR-24.description: Create GET /api/analytics/headcount (trends), /attrition (rate and reasons), /cost (department breakdown), /diversity (demographics). Cached aggregations.

FR-24.title: Build Analytics Dashboard
FR-24.description: Create HR dashboard with headcount trend line, attrition rate gauge with reasons pie chart, department cost bars, and diversity breakdown charts.

FR-25.title: Build Workflow Engine
FR-25.description: Create configurable approval engine. Multi-level chains with role-based routing. Auto-escalation scheduled job on timeout. Workflow template CRUD.

FR-25.title: Build Workflow Admin UI
FR-25.description: Create workflow builder with step editor, approval chain configuration, timeout settings, and template management.

FR-26.title: Build Mobile API
FR-26.description: Create mobile-optimized endpoints for attendance, leave, approvals, and payslips. Push notification service for pending actions.

FR-26.title: Build Mobile App
FR-26.description: Create mobile app with clock in/out, leave request, approval actions, payslip viewer, and push notification handling.

FR-27.title: Build Integration Layer
FR-27.description: Create REST API with authentication. Payroll software connector. SSO via SAML/OAuth. Calendar sync endpoints for Google/Outlook.

FR-27.title: Build Integration Settings
FR-27.description: Create admin integration page with API key management, payroll sync config, SSO setup, and calendar connection.

FR-28.title: Build Multi-Location API
FR-28.description: Create location CRUD. Location-specific policy and holiday config. Transfer workflow between locations. Location filter on all reports.

FR-28.title: Build Location Management UI
FR-28.description: Create location manager with policy overrides, holiday calendar per location, transfer request form, and location-filtered reports.

FR-29.title: Build Probation API
FR-29.description: Create probation tracking with dates. Review scheduling. POST /api/employees/:id/confirm or /extend-probation. Probation policy rules.

FR-29.title: Build Probation UI
FR-29.description: Create probation tracker with end date countdown, review form, confirmation/extension buttons, and probation employee list for HR.

FR-30.title: Build Letter Generation API
FR-30.description: Create POST /api/letters/generate (template_id, employee_id). Template engine with merge fields. Digital signature integration. Letter history storage.

FR-30.title: Build Letter Manager UI
FR-30.description: Create letter template selector, preview with employee data populated, digital signature option, and letter history per employee.
